task_name: Lazy Virtual FAL + SDIO 高頻寫入支持
commits: 3923d7e Implement Lazy Virtual FAL for 2MB TSDB and fix SDIO soft-reset
342ff8a Remove per-write f_sync to reduce SDIO DMA writes, add periodic sync
6ac217b Add high-frequency ADC batch write support for ADS1298
b992e03 Add ADC simulator service for high-frequency batch write testing
1ecb2ef Fix ADC simulator priority and timing issues (disabled by default)
211368b Debug ADC simulator - fix publish logic and data handling
f61789e Add ADC simulation mode to SensorService (Scheme A)
740c3b3 Update COR+AFP+NTP documentation for Scheme A success
9000484 Disable ADC simulation after finding long-term issue
812ffea Add error tracking and sector size experiments

test_results.lazy_virtual_fal: PARTIAL - records work but freeze at sector boundaries
test_results.sdio_soft_reset: PASS - OpenOCD flash without power cycle
test_results.adc_sim_scheme_a: PARTIAL - 10 SPS works but stops after ~10 seconds
test_results.sector_boundary_issue: CONFIRMED - Records freeze at exact sector counts

critical_finding.symptom: Records freeze at exact sector boundaries
critical_finding.root_cause: Lazy Virtual FAL materialize() fails at sector boundaries
critical_finding.system_state: Other tasks normal, only FlashDB write fails

experiments_done.512B_sector: TESTED - Caused initialization failures, reverted to 4096B
experiments_done.error_tracking: ADDED - LCD now shows ERR:X C:Y for debugging
experiments_done.auto_fsdb_delete: ADDED - Option to delete .fdb files on boot
experiments_done.10sps_simulation: DISABLED - Causes sector boundary issues quickly

next_steps.priority_1: Fix Lazy Virtual FAL materialize() at sector boundaries
next_steps.priority_2: Align all writes to sector boundaries
next_steps.priority_3: Test with cluster size matching sector size
next_steps.priority_4: Consider removing Lazy Virtual FAL if fix too complex

current_status: Stable at 1 SPS with known sector boundary limitation (~3033 records)
notes: System works perfectly for normal use. High-frequency writing exposes underlying sector boundary bug.
